creator: yongari@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Close, submitter has no longer access to the hardware in question. 
BCM5708S should be supported by bce(4) but it was not available in 
6.1-RELEASE. This is not true anymore and recent FreeBSD releases 
should support it without problems. If you still encounter the issue 
on more recent FreeBSD releses please open a new PR. 
Thanks.
